com.irurueta.commons.units

Class DistanceFormatter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.commons.units.MeasureFormatter<Distance,DistanceUnit>
      • com.irurueta.commons.units.DistanceFormatter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Cloneable

    public class DistanceFormatter
extends MeasureFormatter<Distance,DistanceUnit>
implements Cloneable
    Class in charge of formatting or parsing a distance value and unit.

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      Singleton instance of distance formatter for default locale.

      Singleton instances of formatter for each instantiated locale.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Object clone()
      Clones this distance formatter.
      boolean equals(Object obj)
      Determines if two distance formatters are equal by comparing all of its internal parameters.
      protected DistanceUnit findUnit(String source)
      Attempts to determine a distance unit from its string representation.
      String formatAndConvert(Distance distance)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using unit system assigned to locale of this instance (if no locale has been provided it is assumed that the system default locale is used).
      String formatAndConvert(Distance distance, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using provided unit system.
      String formatAndConvert(double value, DistanceUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using unit system assigned to locale of this instance (if no locale has been provided it is assumed that the system default locale is used).
      String formatAndConvert(double value, DistanceUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using provided unit system.
      String formatAndConvert(Number value, DistanceUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using unit system assigned to locale of this instance (if no locale has been provided it is assumed that the system default locale is used).
      String formatAndConvert(Number value, DistanceUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using provided unit system.
      String formatAndConvertImperial(Number value, DistanceUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using imperial unit system.
      String formatAndConvertMetric(Number value, DistanceUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using metric unit system.
      static DistanceFormatter getInstance()
      Returns or creates singleton instance of this class using default locale.
      static DistanceFormatter getInstance(Locale locale)
      Returns or creates singleton instance of this class for provided locale.
      protected String getUnitSymbol(DistanceUnit unit)
      Returns unit string representation.
      Distance parse(String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a distance value and unit.

    • Method Detail

      • clone

        public Object clone()
        Clones this distance formatter.
        Specified by:
        clone in class MeasureFormatter<Distance,DistanceUnit>
        Returns:
        a copy of this distance formatter.

      • equals

        public boolean equals(Object obj)
        Determines if two distance formatters are equal by comparing all of its internal parameters.

        equals in class MeasureFormatter<Distance,DistanceUnit>
        Parameters:
        obj - another object to compare.
        Returns:
        true if provided object is assumed to be equal to this instance.

      • getInstance

        public static DistanceFormatter getInstance()
        Returns or creates singleton instance of this class using default locale.
        Returns:
        singleton instance.

      • getInstance

        public static DistanceFormatter getInstance(Locale locale)
                                     throws IllegalArgumentException
        Returns or creates singleton instance of this class for provided locale.
        Parameters:
        locale - locale to set on returned distance formatter.
        Returns:
        a singleton distance formatter for provided locale.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - if locale is null.

      • parse

        public Distance parse(String source)
               throws ParseException,
                      UnknownUnitException
        Parses provided string and tries to determine a distance value and unit.
        Specified by:
        parse in class MeasureFormatter<Distance,DistanceUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a string to be parsed.
        Returns:
        a distance containing a value and unit.
        Throws:
        ParseException - if provided string cannot be parsed.
        UnknownUnitException - if unit cannot be determined.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(Number value,
                      DistanceUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using unit system assigned to locale of this instance (if no locale has been provided it is assumed that the system default locale is used). If provided value is too large for provided unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit.
        Parameters:
        value - a distance value.
        unit - a distance unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(double value,
                      DistanceUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using unit system assigned to locale of this instance (if no locale has been provided it is assumed that the system default locale is used). If provided value is too large for provided unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit.
        Parameters:
        value - a distance value.
        unit - a distance unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(Distance distance)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using unit system assigned to locale of this instance (if no locale has been provided it is assumed that the system default locale is used). If provided value is too large for provided distance unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit.
        Parameters:
        distance - a distance.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(Number value,
                      DistanceUnit unit,
                      UnitSystem system)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using provided unit system. If provided value is too large for provided distance unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit and also using provided unit system.
        Parameters:
        value - a distance value.
        unit - a distance unit.
        system - system unit to convert distance to.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(double value,
                      DistanceUnit unit,
                      UnitSystem system)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using provided unit system. If provided value is too large for provided distance unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit and also using provided unit system.
        Parameters:
        value - a distance value.
        unit - a distance unit.
        system - system unit to convert distance to.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit.

      • formatAndConvert

        public String formatAndConvert(Distance distance,
                      UnitSystem system)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using provided unit system. If provided distance value is too large for provided distance unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit and also using provided unit system.
        Parameters:
        distance - a distance.
        system - system unit to convert distance to.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit.

      • formatAndConvertMetric

        public String formatAndConvertMetric(Number value,
                            DistanceUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using metric unit system. If provided distance value is too large for provided distance unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit.
        Parameters:
        value - a distance value.
        unit - a distance unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit using metric unit system.

      • formatAndConvertImperial

        public String formatAndConvertImperial(Number value,
                              DistanceUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using imperial unit system. If provided distance value is too large for provided distance unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit.
        Parameters:
        value - a distance value.
        unit - a distance unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of distance value and unit using imperial unit system.

      • findUnit

        protected DistanceUnit findUnit(String source)
        Attempts to determine a distance unit from its string representation.
        Specified by:
        findUnit in class MeasureFormatter<Distance,DistanceUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a unit string representation.
        Returns:
        a distance unit, or null if none can be determined.

      • getUnitSymbol

        protected String getUnitSymbol(DistanceUnit unit)
        Returns unit string representation.
        Specified by:
        getUnitSymbol in class MeasureFormatter<Distance,DistanceUnit>
        Parameters:
        unit - a distance unit.
        Returns:
        its string representation.
